title: BTS World Tour: Love Yourself in Seoul
posterAlt: BTS World Tour: Love Yourself in Seoul (2019) movie poster
tmdbOverview: Shot at the Olympic Stadium in Seoul during the BTS World Tour ‘Love Yourself’ to celebrate the seven members of the global boyband and their unprecedented international phenomenon.
synopsis: Released in 2019, BTS World Tour: Love Yourself in Seoul is a music and documentary film from South Korea. It's highly rated, holding a strong 8.9 on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 2010s and genre rankings. It carries a U certification (BN rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
